item.title: 1. Facilitate Communnication and Collaboration
item.description:
Overview#

  • Explore Azure Boards
  • Integrate Azure Boards and Github
  • Create a wiki
  • Create a dashboard
  • Integrate messageing tools
  • Webhooks and ITSM Overview

Azure Boards & GitHub Integration#

  • Integrated Azure Boards with GitHub repositories using Azure DevOps GitHub Connections.
  • Linked GitHub commits to Azure Boards Work Items using commit message conventions (AB#ID).
  • Enabled automatic work item tracking and status updates from GitHub development activities.
  • Improved traceability between project management and source code changes.

Intergrate messaging tools#

Microsoft Teams Integration#

  • Integrated Azure Boards, Repos, and Pipelines with Microsoft Teams.
  • Configured project linking, event subscriptions, and automated notifications.
  • Created and managed work items, repository activities, and pipeline monitoring directly from Teams.
  • Improved team collaboration and visibility across the DevOps lifecycle.

Note: These images are taken from my online learning lab environment for study and testing purposes. The actual behavior may vary depending on the Microsoft Teams license and configuration used in a real-world setup.

item.title: 2. Develop a Security and Compliance Plan
item.description:
Overview#

  • Learn about Active Directory features
  • Integrate Active Directory
  • Service connection authentication
  • Set up policies, groups, and access levels
  • Set up Azure Key Vault
  • User Azure DevOps variables

item.title: 3. Manage Source Control
item.description:
Overview#

  • Create a GIt repository
  • Practice Git
  • Use Git workflows, branches, and tags
  • Work with branch policies and pull requests
  • Learn about merging and merge conflicts
  • Learn about advanced Git features
  • Review Github Codespaaces

item.title: 4. Define and Implement Continuous Integration
item.description:
Overview#

  • Set up build agents
  • Create classic Azure Pipelines
  • Create YAML pipelines
  • Create packages
  • Set up feeds
  • Build a container image
  • Run and push container images
  • Implement code quality
  • Implement DevSecOps

item.title: 5. Ooptimize Build Pipelines
item.description:
Overview#

  • Intergate Azure Pipelines with Github
  • Optimize pipelines perfomance
  • Multistage Docker builds
  • Review pipeline monitoring and analytics

item.title: 6. Design Continous Delivery
item.description:
Overview#

  • Set up a realse pipeline
  • Set dependencies, approvals, and gates
  • Deploy ARM templates
  • User custom script extension
  • Configure desired state configuration
  • Set up automation state configuration
  • Learn about Azure app configuration

item.title: 7. Implement Continous Delivery
item.description:
Overview#

  • Learn about deployment groups
  • Configure a VM scale set
  • Learn about Azure app service
  • Learn about manual and exploratory testing
  • Set up automated testing
  • Learn about test repors
  • Set up rolling deployment
  • Configure canary deployment
  • Learn about Blue-Green deployment

item.title: 8. Develop a Site Reliability Enginering Strategy
item.description:
Overview#

  • Azure Service Health
  • Load balancer and scale sets
  • Load balancer health probe
  • Containter liveness and readiness probes
  • Application health extension

item.title: 9. Develop an Instrumentation Stategy
item.description:
Overview#

  • Azure Monitor overview
  • Logging
  • Metrics
  • Appication insights
  • Monitor virtual machines
  • Set up alerting
  • Visual Studio App Center

item.title: 10. Lastest Topics
item.description:
Overview#

  • End-to-end traceability
  • Azure Bicep
  • Azure Automanage machine configuration
